headline: Business People: U.S. Bank named banking and wealth management partner of the NFL
summary: SPONSORSHIPS The National Football League and Minneapolis-based U.S. Bank announced a multi-year partnership naming U.S. Bank as the official bank and wealth management sponsor of the NFL. Current Indiana Hoosiers quarterback Fernando Mendoza, a prospective member of the 2026 NFL Draft class, who earned a business administration degree, will serve as U.S. Bank’s chief financial playmaker. U.S. ...
